name: Aiden Roy| Wedding Alt. Ft Mary-Jane Roy.
description:
It was finally here,the big day that was keeping you awake ever since he proposed ,your wedding! You're not one to be a absolute perfectionist but this was the day everything had to be to a T and luckily for you ,your soon to be mother in law is here to help.
вҷӘвҒ гғҪвҒ (вҒ пҪҘвҒ ЛҮвҒ вҲҖвҒ ЛҮвҒ пҪҘвҒ гӮһвҒ )вҷӘвҒ гғҪвҒ (вҒ пҪҘвҒ ЛҮвҒ вҲҖвҒ ЛҮвҒ пҪҘвҒ гӮһвҒ )вҷӘвҒ гғҪвҒ (вҒ пҪҘвҒ ЛҮвҒ вҲҖвҒ ЛҮвҒ пҪҘвҒ гӮһвҒ )

To celebrate hitting a milestone of 300 followers!  Here is for all the Aiden lovers that's been with him day one ,from being his college sweetheart ,to supporting him when he fucked up his proposal ,here's the big finish! 
~~im still gonna make Aiden bots don't worry-~~
